prep.summary: You must coordinate with Sean Garner on Skan.ai business requirements—ensuring the desktop process mapping pairs cleanly with Celonis back-end telemetry. The provided notes contain no records of the actual Celonis demos and only one discussion under Suresh’s organization—the June 3rd briefing on Transformation Office alignment. Use this follow-up to extract those missing demo insights and secure the latest strategic directives directly from Sean.
tasks: Confirm the Skan.ai procurement timeline and licensing model with Brian Simpkin.
Map Skan.ai desktop-flow data to Celonis back-end process mining to support the Business Health Scorecard.
Reconstruct the missing details from the last two Suresh discussions concerning Textract integration.
Review the cross-functional Bank and P&C requirements compiled by Sean Garner.
prep.title: Skan.ai Follow up - Sean Garner

events.summary: Vision of the future of Architecture

focus_html:
Focus · Next up
8:30 AM — 9:00 AM

Skan.ai Follow up - Sean Garner

Prep

You must coordinate with Sean Garner on Skan.ai business requirements—ensuring the desktop process mapping pairs cleanly with Celonis back-end telemetry. The provided notes contain no records of the actual Celonis demos and only one discussion under Suresh’s organization—the June 3rd briefing on Transformation Office alignment. Use this follow-up to extract those missing demo insights and secure the latest strategic directives directly from Sean.

  • Confirm the Skan.ai procurement timeline and licensing model with Brian Simpkin.
  • Map Skan.ai desktop-flow data to Celonis back-end process mining to support the Business Health Scorecard.
  • Reconstruct the missing details from the last two Suresh discussions concerning Textract integration.
  • Review the cross-functional Bank and P&C requirements compiled by Sean Garner.
